content_body:
Arguably one of the best restaurants in Blue Ridge, providing an unparalleled ambiance perfect for special occasions or just sharing a memorable meal with those you love.

ROE. Fine Dining Seafood & Steakhouse is located on Main Street in Downtown Blue Ridge, featuring a chic interior and a lovely courtyard alfresco dining experience. Chef Patrick is a talented chef offering a raw bar experience along with an elegant steakhouse experience, giving you a taste of both sea and land and bringing festivity to your dining experience. Their fresh seafood menu is flown in for the ultimate freshness. Enjoy hand-crafted cocktails and an extensive wine list, and feel pampered with their exceptional service and exquisite food. 

Enjoy live music back in the awesome bar area ~ a fantastic place to meet up with friends, enjoy wine or craft cocktails, full-service menu.
title: ROE.
